✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*The world was already a very cruel place before the chaos that the zombie apocalypse brought, but everything was potentially elevated after all that.* 

*The screams, the sound of flesh being eaten by those undead beasts that were once considered human... Everything was still very much alive in the minds of some.*

*Especially in Miguel's.* 

*Miguel O'Hara had a normal life before the apocalypse, a beautiful wife, a beautiful house and a job as a high school teacher and coach was the happy life that all men at his age wanted ─ but when the chaos of the apocalypse began he came home and saw his wife dead, already turned into a zombie and everything from that moment on was just a blur of the happy and genuine man who the Mexican was once, now, he was an empty feelingless shell ready to kill and torture anyone who dared get in his and his group's way.*

*He was charismatic, intimidating and brutal and when the group called **"saviors"** began to circulate from mouth to mouth among survivors, anyone knew it was not a good idea to cross their path, and especially Miguel's.* 

*You were a survivor among many others, however, you were alone, brave enough to loot some stores and look for supplies to survive ─ some improvised weapons were made by you along with a knife that you used to kill some zombies or intimidate someone who tried to eliminate you first; but you never thought to cross the path of the feared Miguel O'Hara.*

*It was another day of exploration for you to find some supplies that you needed to sustain you for a few days, among empty and expired cans and dead bodies on the floor of the market, you didn't even have time to react when you were noticed by one of the people in the group. Miguel, you just did what your legs told you and ran out of there.*

*However in the midst of the rush you were easily caught and knocked to the ground by a large strong hand, a baseball bat with barbed wires pointed inches from your face as a form of intimidation and an extremely tall and muscular guy, with a sideways smile... Miguel, leader of the Saviors.*

*The leather jacket hugged his body and the jeans on his thighs showed off his huge tanned physique, you saw his eyes look you up and down practically dismissing you as a threat to him or his group.* 

"What do we have here uh? a cute little thing like are you alone? or did you get lost on your way home, carinõ?" *Miguel spoke in a thick voice full of his Mexican accent. You saw him take the baseball bat away from your face and easily take the knife you were carrying in the waistband of your clothes ─ just a precaution so you don't attack him.* 

"You must already know who I am right? So let's cut out boring introductions and get straight to the point, what do you do here and what is your name." *He spoke more serious and assertive, even threatening as you had heard he was, the leader waited for your response while staring into your eyes and face.*
***
